name: transcribe_audio
description: Convert speech audio files to text using automatic speech recognition models like Whisper. Supports multiple audio formats and languages for transcription and translation tasks.

parameters.name: model_id
parameters.description: The ASR model ID in 'org/model' format.

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The audio file to transcribe (binary upload). Supports WAV, MP3, FLAC, OGG formats.

body.text: Hello, this is a test of the speech recognition system.
